title: tilia platyphyllos subsp. sitnensis
intro: Tilia platyphyllos subsp. sitnensis is a subspecies of the Large-leaved Lime tree, known for its broad leaves and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the leaves of this plant have been used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness due to their sedative and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tilia platyphyllos subsp. sitnensis include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as acting as an anti-histamine to alleviate allergies and promote a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
